item.title: Static electricity has memory
item.description: The experiment that proved static electricity has a memory

media:content.media:title: Static electricity has memory
media:content.media:description: The experiment that proved static electricity has a memory

item.title: Why do ladybugs follow your drawings?
item.description: In this video I show you how a lady bug will follow a pen line and even avoid a permanent marker line. I talk about why it might be doing this odd behavior.

media:content.media:title: Why do ladybugs follow your drawings?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how a lady bug will follow a pen line and even avoid a permanent marker line. I talk about why it might be doing this odd behavior.

item.title: Holographic rainbows on chocolate
item.description: In this video I talk about diffraction gratings and how they work. I show you how you can use them to make diffraction patterns on chocolate or other shiny materials.

media:content.media:title: Holographic rainbows on chocolate
media:content.media:description: In this video I talk about diffraction gratings and how they work. I show you how you can use them to make diffraction patterns on chocolate or other shiny materials.

item.title: This shape meanders instead of rolls
item.description: In this video I show you the sphericon and talk about how it works. I also show you a homemade version of the sphericon you can make at home using coins.

media:content.media:title: This shape meanders instead of rolls
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you the sphericon and talk about how it works. I also show you a homemade version of the sphericon you can make at home using coins.

item.title: Real Iron Man suit
item.description: In this video I test the practicality of a $3,000 Iron Man suit by putting it to the test against various everyday activities. Watch as I don the Iron man suit (it took two hours!) and then try to open doors, go up stairs, run, play basketball, and even try to kiss (if Spiderman can do it why not Iron Man?).

media:content.media:title: Real Iron Man suit
media:content.media:description: In this video I test the practicality of a $3,000 Iron Man suit by putting it to the test against various everyday activities. Watch as I don the Iron man suit (it took two hours!) and then try to open doors, go up stairs, run, play basketball, and even try to kiss (if Spiderman can do it why not Iron Man?).
